## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce Zuplo's API management platform and explore potential collaboration with fwd.digital for growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Zuplo aims to create an API directory as part of a growth flywheel, leveraging AI and human-in-the-loop processes](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers programmatic SEO and editorial workstreams, with potential for custom API directory development](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Tentative kickoff date set for January 13th, with a focus on gradual approach and scalability](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Additional services like AI-driven outbound marketing for backlinks discussed as complementary strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)

## Topics

### Zuplo's Product and Growth Strategy

  - [API management platform for building, monetizing, and integrating APIs](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Self-serve model with free tier and upsell strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Current growth efforts: YouTube channel, SEO-optimized blog, aiming to become synonymous with APIs](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Vision: Create an API directory with AI-generated quick starts, documentation, and quality evaluation tools](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)

### fwd.digital's Offerings and Approach

  - [Programmatic SEO workstream: $9,000/month, \~1,200 pages/year](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Editorial workstream available but not primary focus for Zuplo](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Custom workflows, API enrichment, human review, and SEO optimization included](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Scalable approach based on desired automation vs. human review balance](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [AI-driven outbound marketing for backlinks: $6,000/month, 20-30 high-quality backlinks/month](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)

### Project Scope and Timeline

  - [Zuplo interested in programmatic approach, starting with typical scope](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [Gradual scaling based on automation success and quality assessment](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Tentative kickoff date: January 13th, 2025](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [No specific guarantees, but expectation of traffic growth over time (3-6 month ramp-up period)](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)

### Collaboration Process

  - [Shared Slack channel for easier communication](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Detailed SOW to be sent by fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Phased approach: establish production, watch for signals, optimize surface area](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)

## Next Steps

  - [fwd.digital to send Statement of Work (SOW) and Slack channel invitation](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Zuplo to review proposal and discuss internally with CEO](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Confirm January 13th kickoff date if moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting if more details needed](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [Consider meeting in person for coffee in Oakland/Montclair area](https://fathom.video/share/ZZHWLjdzrQ15xEK4tsrJN-xxjGJm8pLp?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
